_description: Artist whose catalog includes 5 recordings, of which 3 are flagged as orphans — ISRCs present in reviewed sources without corresponding release linkage. Publishing data is otherwise healthy so the orphan signal is the dominant catalog risk.
_expectedBehavior: Engine fires catalog.orphan-recordings-detected (HIGH, HIGH confidence). One CATALOG observation with severity HIGH in observations[]. One entry in risks[]. One recommendation in recommendations[] ('Verify catalog delivery and confirm release linkage for the affected recordings.'). publishing.strong-coverage may also fire as a strength because worksCount>0 and publishingCoverage>=80; that is acceptable per Phase 6 rules.
